creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
----- Forwarded message from Rodrigo OSORIO <rodrigo@bebik.net> -----

From: Rodrigo OSORIO <rodrigo@bebik.net>
Date: Sat, 22 Oct 2011 16:11:13 +0200
To: eadler@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/161474: editors/omegaT upgrade to 2.3.0.2
User-Agent: Mutt/1.4.2.3i


Hi,

I fix the remaining warnings and errors reported by portlint -C.
I don't think USE_LDCONFIG is required, the libraries aren't shared with anyone. (checked with @bapt)

Regards

On 17/10/11 21:39 +0000, eadler@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: editors/omegaT upgrade to 2.3.0.2
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: eadler
> State-Changed-When: Mon Oct 17 21:39:28 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> a) please use tabs, not spaces b) please try portlint -C before
> submitting diffs, there are some variables out of order c) no need to
> define LICENCE_FILE d) Do you need to have USE_LDCONFIG?
> 
> Thanks for making FreeBSD better
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=161474
> 



----- End forwarded message -----
